etymology.interpretation: 舊夢(舊夢) (jiùmèng, "old dream") refers to a dream or experience from the past. This combination suggests the idea of reminiscing or recalling past experiences or memories, often with a sense of nostalgia or sentimentality.

examples.chinese: 每当我听到这首歌(每當我聽到這首歌)，就会想起那些旧梦(就會想起那些舊夢)。
examples.pinyin: Měidāng wǒ tīng dào zhè shǒu gē, jiù huì xiǎng qǐ nàxiē jiùmèng.
examples.english: Whenever I hear this song, I remember those old dreams.

examples.chinese: 旧梦重现时(舊夢重現時)，他的脸上露出了微笑(他的臉上露出了微笑)。
examples.pinyin: Jiùmèng chóngxiàn shí, tā de liǎn shàng lùchū le wēixiào.
examples.english: When old dreams reappeared, a smile appeared on his face.

examples.chinese: 她常常沉浸在旧梦中(她常常沉浸在舊夢中)，无法自拔(無法自拔)。
examples.pinyin: Tā chángcháng chénjìn zài jiùmèng zhōng, wúfǎ zìbá.
examples.english: She often gets lost in old dreams, unable to free herself.
